'''gatara''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:huanca|huanca]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-t-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:huanca|huanca]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| gatara
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gætæræth|gætæræth]] || [[word:gætæræj|gætæræj]] || [[word:gætæræsh|gætæræsh]] || [[word:gætæræ|gætæræ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gatatarath|gatatarath]] || [[word:gatataraj|gatataraj]] || [[word:gatatarash|gatatarash]] || [[word:gatatara|gatatara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gatarath|gatarath]] || [[word:gataraj|gataraj]] || [[word:gatarash|gatarash]] || [[word:gatara|gatara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gatafrath|gatafrath]] || [[word:gatafraj|gatafraj]] || [[word:gatafrash|gatafrash]] || [[word:gatafraf|gatafraf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gataratha|gataratha]] || [[word:gataraja|gataraja]] || [[word:gatarasha|gatarasha]] || [[word:gataraka|gataraka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gatarath|gatarath]] || [[word:gataraj|gataraj]] || [[word:gatarash|gatarash]] || [[word:gatara|gatara]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gatarathal|gatarathal]] || [[word:gatarajal|gatarajal]] || [[word:gatarashal|gatarashal]] || [[word:gatarakal|gatarakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gatarathatha|gatarathatha]] || [[word:gatarajaja|gatarajaja]] || [[word:gatarashasha|gatarashasha]] || [[word:gataraka|gataraka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gatarathan|gatarathan]] || [[word:gatarajan|gatarajan]] || [[word:gatarashan|gatarashan]] || [[word:gatarakan|gatarakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gatarathaoro|gatarathaoro]] || [[word:gatarajaoro|gatarajaoro]] || [[word:gatarashaoro|gatarashaoro]] || [[word:gatarakaoro|gatarakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
